did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper focuses on signal processing for bistatic MIMO radar, specifically proposing ESPRIT and Unitary ESPRIT algorithms for joint direction of departure (DOD) and direction of arrival (DOA) estimation. It does not involve dermatology, skin pathology, or medical imaging.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
